topics.title: Developmental Brain Connectivity in Neuropsychiatric Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain connectivity and structure-function coupling vary across development and the lifespan in autism, schizophrenia, and related psychosis-spectrum conditions. It emphasizes human brain network organization and connectivity alterations rather than a specific imaging method.

topics.title: fMRI of Language and Visual Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on fMRI studies of neural representation and encoding in language, speech comprehension, attention, and visual cortex organization. It also includes developmental and network-level investigations such as default mode network and high-resolution 7T mapping.

topics.title: White Matter Microstructure Across Disease and Development
topics.description: This cluster centers on diffusion MRI studies of white matter microstructure and structural connectivity across lifespan development and aging. It also includes applications to neurological and psychiatric conditions such as multiple sclerosis and cognitive impairment.

topics.title: EEG and Brain Dynamics in Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on EEG-based investigations of brain dynamics, functional connectivity, and neural correlates across cognition, sleep, consciousness, and language processing. It also includes studies of aging, healthy aging, and individual differences in electrophysiological patterns.

topics.title: Aging and Alzheimer Disease Progression
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurodegenerative change across aging, especially Alzheimer disease, cognitive decline, and progression from preclinical and prodromal stages to dementia. It highlights biomarkers and structural MRI measures such as amyloid, tau, atrophy, and brain age.

topics.title: Neuroimaging Prediction and Foundation Models
topics.description: This cluster centers on applying machine learning and foundation models to neuroimaging data for prediction and classification tasks. It includes fmri, mri, and meg studies focused on functional connectivity, resting state fmri, and related brain representations.

topics.title: Adolescent Neurodevelopment and Mental Health Risk
topics.description: This cluster centers on how adversity, familial risk, and developmental stage relate to neurodevelopment and psychopathology across childhood and adolescence. It emphasizes depressive symptoms, resilience, and related mental health outcomes in youth.

topics.title: Neuromodulation and Treatment Response in Depression
topics.description: This cluster centers on depression and major depressive disorder, especially treatment-resistant cases, suicidal ideation, and related anxiety or affective disorders. It emphasizes therapeutic approaches such as CBT, TMS, electroconvulsive therapy, and Stanford neuromodulation therapy, along with functional connectivity and response outcomes.

topics.title: Neural Bases of Emotion and Social Processing
topics.description: This cluster centers on how emotions, social cognition, and regulatory processes relate to neural responses across contexts such as anxiety, fear, empathy, and reward. It also includes related work on cognitive reappraisal, misophonia, curiosity, and amygdala-linked mechanisms.

keywords: an automatic pipeline for sulcal feature extraction
benchmarke spatiotemporal fetal brain atlas construction
topics.title: Cortical Atlases and Automated Brain Segmentation
topics.description: This cluster centers on building cortical and fetal brain atlases, especially around cortical folding and 3D reconstruction. It also includes automated segmentation and parcellation pipelines for MRI-based brain mapping.

topics.title: Transdiagnostic Genetics and Brain Structure
topics.description: This cluster centers on psychiatric disorders and psychosis-spectrum conditions, with emphasis on transdiagnostic heterogeneity across schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and depression. It links genetic architecture and genetics to brain structure and cortical structure, often using normative modeling to map variation.

topics.title: Epilepsy Localization and Network Connectivity
topics.description: These studies focus on identifying epileptogenic zones and characterizing brain connectivity in epilepsy, often using intracranial recordings and MEG. They also examine pediatric cases, lesions, and therapy response in drug resistant epilepsy.

topics.title: Brain Dynamics and Consciousness Modeling
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain state and brain dynamics relate to consciousness, anesthesia, sleep, and stimulation. It emphasizes modeling and inference approaches such as effective connectivity, dynamic causal modeling, and brain network models.

topics.title: Stroke recovery, language deficits, and network mapping
topics.description: This cluster centers on stroke-related language and cognitive impairments, especially aphasia, and how recovery relates to lesion location, structural disconnection, and brain lateralization. It also includes predictive and network-mapping approaches using stimulation and neuroimaging methods.

topics.title: Open Neuroimaging Workflows and Standards
topics.description: This cluster focuses on open, standardized neuroimaging infrastructure for data management, processing, and workflow integration. It emphasizes BIDS-based conversion and alignment, cloud-enabled tools, and scalable platforms for collaborative analysis and visualization.

topics.title: Parkinson Disease Connectivity and Stimulation
topics.description: This cluster centers on Parkinson disease, especially deep brain stimulation, substantia nigra involvement, and dopaminergic connectivity changes. It also includes biomarkers and imaging markers related to iron accumulation, alpha synuclein pathology, and treatment response.

keywords: neural trajectories of phantom limb pain longitudinal
topics.title: Neural Signatures of Chronic Pain
topics.description: This cluster centers on chronic pain conditions and the neural, functional, and morphometric signatures associated with pain perception and modulation. It also includes longitudinal and network-level studies linking brain markers, connectivity pathways, and central sensitization to pain phenotypes.

topics.title: Multimodal Meta-Analytic Neuroimaging of Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on meta-analytic and systematic review approaches used to synthesize multimodal neuroimaging findings across neurological and psychiatric disorders. It emphasizes brain network, lesion, and morphometric patterns associated with diverse clinical conditions.

topics.title: Neural alterations in chronic tinnitus
topics.description: This cluster focuses on tinnitus, especially chronic tinnitus and phantom sound perception, alongside associated brain changes and neural markers. It also highlights anatomical differences, gray matter volume alterations, and risk factors involving the prefrontal cortex.

topics.title: Glaucoma and Visual Cortex Metabolic Profiling
topics.description: Studies linking glaucoma phenotypes with metabolic differences in the visual cortex using magnetic resonance spectroscopy. The cluster centers on characterizing disease-related brain and eye changes through imaging-based profiling.

topics.title: Brain and Blood Vasomechanics
topics.description: This cluster centers on vasomechanic effects involving blood and brain protein-related findings. The phrases suggest a small, topic-focused set of abstracts dealing with vascular and cerebral responses.
